---
title: "The Team"
---

## Group 14

We are a team of three from ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications.

| Member | Role in the project |
|---|---|
| **Li Xinyue** | Data preparation and the Interaction Network module; project website and version control. |
| **Cheng Yuanyuan** | Temporal Anomaly module. |
| **Yang Yang** | Internal-State Explorer module and documentation. |

All members jointly review the final Shiny integration, the project website, the poster, and the presentation narrative.
